x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Generic relationship types (Unknown, Connected by) provide minimal context for Now Assist impact traversal. Specific typed relationships allow the AI to reason about dependency direction and impact scope.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review and replace generic relationship types (Unknown, Connected by) with specific typed relationships (Runs on, Depends on, Hosted on). Service Mapping auto-creates typed relationships during discovery. Specific types allow Now Assist to reason about dependency direction and impact scope.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c63
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Generic relationship types (Unknown, Connected by) provide minimal context for Now Assist impact traversal. Specific typed relationships allow the AI to reason about dependency direction and impact scope.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Relationship Type Distribution</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTypes = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_type');
    gaTypes.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTypes.query();
    var types = gaTypes.next() ? parseInt(gaTypes.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var totalRels = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaGeneric = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    gaGeneric.addQuery('type.name', 'CONTAINS', 'Unknown');
    gaGeneric.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaGeneric.query();
    var generic = gaGeneric.next() ? parseInt(gaGeneric.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var genericPct = totalRels > 0 ? Math.round((generic / totalRels) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = types + ' distinct relationship types | ' + generic + ' generic/Unknown relationships (' + genericPct + '%)';

    if (types >= 10 && genericPct <= 10) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: types + ' distinct relationship types with only ' + genericPct + '% generic. Now Assist can reason about dependency direction and impact scope using typed CI relationships.' };
    } else if (types >= 5 || genericPct <= 30) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: types + ' relationship types with ' + genericPct + '% generic/Unknown (targets: 10+ types, ≤10% generic). Improve relationship typing for more accurate Now Assist impact analysis.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + types + ' relationship types with ' + genericPct + '% generic/Unknown relationships. Now Assist cannot determine dependency direction or impact scope without well-typed CI relationships.' };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CMDB</module>
<number>CHK0006009</number>
<order>120</order>
<remediation_guidance>Review and replace generic relationship types (Unknown, Connected by) with specific typed relationships (Runs on, Depends on, Hosted on). Service Mapping auto-creates typed relationships during discovery. Specific types allow Now Assist to reason about dependency direction and impact scope.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c63</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
